No Poverty.reason: The course content and objectives do not address poverty in any dimension.

Zero Hunger.reason: The course content and objectives do not relate to hunger, food security, or nutrition.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course does not address health, well-being, or related issues.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it directly provides quality tertiary education (4.3), skills for employment (4.4), and fosters cultural understanding (4.7).

Gender Equality.reason: The course content does not address gender equality, discrimination, or empowerment.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: The course content does not relate to water, sanitation, or hygiene issues.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: The course content does not relate to energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course explicitly aims to equip students with language skills and professional competitiveness for work, directly supporting productive employment (Target 8.5).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course explicitly uses AI technology and teacher-developed online systems, demonstrating innovation and leveraging ICT for learning (Targets 9.5, 9.c).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Fostering an international perspective and mobility can indirectly promote social inclusion and understanding across diverse groups, aligning with Targets 10.2 and 10.7.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: Understanding Japanese society and culture indirectly contributes to appreciating and safeguarding cultural heritage (Target 11.4), though the link is weak.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The instruction to "務必使用正版書籍" (use legitimate textbooks) promotes responsible consumption of intellectual property, a minor but valid link.

Climate Action.reason: The course content does not address climate change, its causes, or mitigation/adaptation strategies.

Life Below Water.reason: The course content does not relate to marine ecosystems or ocean health.

Life on Land.reason: The course content does not relate to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or land degradation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Fostering an international perspective and cultural understanding can indirectly promote a culture of peace and non-discrimination (Target 16.b).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Developing Japanese language skills and international mobility builds capacity for international communication and cooperation, supporting global partnerships (Targets 17.6, 17.9).
